parents.subject: LU-12187 lfs: add EC setstripe support with X+Y notation

commit.subject: LU-12187 lov: Basic do-no-harm lov IO support
commit.message:
LU-12187 lov: Basic do-no-harm lov IO support

Support for EC components not interfering with
regular IO - should be able to do 'normal' IO
on EC files with expected results.

No support for intent and layout state updates
yet.

Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ib0786f2584e227ef517d739f079ad4ffe094e4c8
